This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Should use the second position option with enough space right
  assert_equals: Anchored element should be at the top of anchor expected 450 but got 650
[FAIL] Should still use the second position option as long as it fits
  assert_equals: Anchored element should be at the top of anchor expected 350 but got 550
[FAIL] Should use the first position option with enough space below and right
  assert_equals: Anchored element should be at the right of anchor expected 650 but got 450
Harness: the test ran to completion.
